question: Device won't turn on
answer: Hold the power button for 10 seconds to force a restart. If nothing happens, plug it into a wall charger (not a laptop/USB hub) for 15 minutes and try again.

question: Battery drains too fast
answer: Go to Settings > Battery and check for background apps using high power. A full battery calibration (drain to 0%, then charge uninterrupted to 100%) often resolves this.

question: How to track an order
answer: You can track your order using the order ID in the 'My Orders' section of your account, or I can look it up if you share your order number.

question: Return policy
answer: Items can be returned within 30 days of delivery in original condition. I can generate a prepaid return label if you give me your order ID.

question: Error code E101
answer: E101 indicates a firmware mismatch. Update to the latest firmware via Settings > System > Software Update, then restart the device.

question: Error code E204
answer: E204 means the sensor calibration failed. Remove any case/cover, place the device on a flat surface, and run Settings > Sensors > Recalibrate.

question: How to factory reset
answer: Go to Settings > System > Reset > Factory Reset. This erases all data, so back up first via Settings > Backup.

question: WiFi keeps disconnecting
answer: Forget the network in Settings > WiFi, then reconnect. If it persists, update the device firmware and your router's firmware.

question: Bluetooth won't pair
answer: Remove the device from your phone's Bluetooth list, restart both devices, then re-pair by holding the pairing button for 5 seconds.

question: Device overheating
answer: Stop charging and using the device for 30 minutes to cool down. Avoid covering it while charging. If overheating continues, this may require a hardware inspection.
